summary: Session 3 of 4: inline validation + static editor instructions + old-path retirement. (D6) Pure providerKeyPresent(env) predicate in gettingStartedDetection.ts (any one of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY non-blank; whitespace counts as absent; System+User merge + reload-window rationale documented in JSDoc); GettingStartedPayload gains providerKeyPresent computed host-side from process.env; the form renders a gs-warning under the Build button visible only when the Full radio is active AND no key is present, toggled client-side on radio changes. (D7) gs-note worktree info under the parallel checkbox (git worktrees, merged back to main when sets complete), visible only while checked - resolves carried issue S060-S2-V1-001 with the checked-vs-unchecked rendering tests its suggestedTestOrCheck asked for. Testability: the form HTML builders were EXTRACTED from client.js into media/session-sets-tree/gettingStartedHtml.js (UMD-lite, loaded as a second nonce'd script before client.js, require()-able from mocha - the Set 052 dashboardHtml pure-builders precedent); client.js keeps wiring only. (D8) Token-free getting-started.md.template added to the consumer-bootstrap bundle carrying the operator SVG's 5-step teaching copy ~verbatim (typos fixed; '{insert hyperlink}' resolved to the tier-model SSoT GitHub URL); written to docs/dabbler/getting-started.md by BOTH scaffold paths; new commands/gettingStartedDoc.ts opens it as a markdown preview (workspace copy preferred, else bundled copy materialized into globalStorage); CustomSessionSetsView auto-opens it once per extension session when a non-list Getting Started surface first ships. (Old path) WizardPanel.ts + webview/wizard.html DELETED; dabbler.getStarted re-registered to focus the Session Set Explorer + open the instructions; dabbler.setupNewProject KEPT as a palette entry but converged on the same no-prompt structure-only scaffold (tier QuickPick only; title/purpose/count prompts, git-init modal, worktree modal retired); planImport/sessionGenPrompt registrations moved to extension.ts; viewsWelcome copy, package description, and 6 stale doc references reconciled (quick-start, tier-model SSoT, repository-reference file map, extension README, workflow doc, bundle README); wizard.html cold-start-closure tests replaced with getting-started.md.template pins. Also fixed 3 PRE-EXISTING tsc cast errors in gettingStartedActions.test.ts (S2 latent; broke the npm-test compile step) and regenerated the cold-start goldens for the new artifact. 695 TS passing / 2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures; Python 1185 passed / 1 skipped; drift guard OK. No release this session (0.29.0 bump is Session 4).
verification_notes: Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (OpenAI), 1 round, $0.2580: VERIFIED with zero issues. The verifier confirmed the D6 host-driven warning, the D7 checked-only note (S060-S2-V1-001 resolved with implementation + tests), the D8 bundled/scaffolded/opened instructions, and endorsed the spec-delegated retirement decisions (WizardPanel deleted not folded; setupNewProject kept as a converged no-prompt palette entry). No sN-issues.json written (clean round writes none, per the Set 055 invariant). Step 3.5 deviation note: Sessions 1-2 ran without ai-assignment.md; it was created this session with S1/S2 backfilled as actuals-only entries and the S3/S4 recommendations routed through gemini-pro (analysis, $0.0070).

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (gemini-pro, 2026-06-10, $0.0070): Session 4 is mechanical version/docs edits + a UAT checklist gated on operator UAT on a local build; a fast, low-cost model is sufficient, with cross-provider verification still routed for release safety. (The routed output named 'claude-haiku-1', which is not a real model id; recorded as the current Haiku tier, claude-haiku-4-5.) Operator may reasonably override to a more capable model since Session 4 gates the 0.29.0 release.
